purpose: Communicate to the user that a list, page, or section has no content yet, and optionally guide them toward a next action.
whenToUse: A list or feed has no items (first-time use, cleared inbox, no search results).
A section has no data yet because the user has not set it up.
Content was deleted and nothing remains.
whenNotToUse: As a loading state — use LoadingState / Skeleton instead.
As an error state — use ErrorState with retry CTA instead.
When the list is partially populated; show real content and suppress the empty state.

anatomy.illustration: Optional. SVG or Lottie asset that visually reinforces the context. Should not be decorative-only — must relate to the empty situation.
anatomy.icon: Optional alternative to illustration when a lightweight indicator is sufficient.
anatomy.headline: Required. Short (≤ 5 words), plain-language statement of the empty situation.
anatomy.bodyText: Optional. 1–2 sentences explaining why it is empty or what the user can do.
anatomy.primaryAction: Optional. Primary CTA button — most common next action (e.g., 'Add your first item').
anatomy.secondaryAction: Optional. Secondary / ghost button for an alternative path (e.g., 'Learn more').

variants.name: iconOnly
variants.description: Icon + headline + optional body. No illustration. Lightweight, suitable for dense UIs or small containers.

variants.name: illustrated
variants.description: Illustration (SVG/Lottie) + headline + optional body + optional actions. Full-page empty states.

variants.name: actionable
variants.description: Either variant above plus at least one CTA. Used when the user can immediately fix the empty situation.

variants.name: readOnly
variants.description: Headline + optional body only, no actions. Used when the empty state is informational and the user cannot fix it.

sizes.name: compact
sizes.description: For small containers (list section, card body). Icon 24 dp, headline labelMd, no illustration.

sizes.name: standard
sizes.description: Default. For page-level empty states. Icon 48 dp or illustration up to 200 dp.

accessibility.semanticLabel: The headline and body text must be readable by screen readers. Illustration/icon should have a Semantics label describing the visual context or be marked excludeSemantics: true if purely decorative.
accessibility.focusOrder: If actions are present, the primary action should receive focus first.
accessibility.minTouchTarget: Action buttons must be at least 48 × 48 dp.

flutterMappingNotes.illustration: Use SvgPicture.asset or Lottie.asset. Wrap in SizedBox(width: 200) for standard size.

props.headline: No messages yet
props.body: When you receive messages, they'll appear here.
